title: Cartesia Recognizer Options
description: Cartesia-specific STT options. Only applies when recognizer vendor is 'cartesia'.

turnDetection.description: Enable Cartesia's server-side turn detection (uses the /stt/turns/websocket endpoint, ink-2 model, English only). When enabled the stream emits native turn-taking events (start/eager-end/resume/end) used for low-latency turn taking in the agent and gather verbs.
